name: em-claude-plugins
description: Personal marketplace of Claude Code plugins maintained by em

plugins.name: em-review
plugins.description: Parallel multi-perspective code review across 9 reviewers (5 Claude + 4 GPT/Codex). Cross-model agreement scoring + opt-in auto-fix loop. Each reviewer is also usable standalone via /em-review:<perspective>.

plugins.name: em-sdd
plugins.description: Spec-Driven Development (SDD) workflow orchestrator. Walks a feature through create-spec → create-plan → verify-plan → implement → check → verify, tracking progress in sdd.yaml.
